changes.before: She heard herself doing it again—careful, pared down, built for someone she assumed needed the simpler version.
changes.after: She was doing it again—careful, pared down, built for someone she assumed needed the simpler version.

changes.before: The escort formed around Sylvanas without discussion. Cyndia on the left. Lyriel on the right with a longbow already strung. Neral at the rear, broad-shouldered and steady, the sort who looked built to keep order when the road broke. Sylvanas spoke once, and the escort dropped into formation.
changes.after: The escort closed around Sylvanas without a word—Cyndia left, Lyriel right with her longbow already strung, Neral steady at the rear, reins loose in practiced hands—and dropped into formation when Sylvanas spoke.

changes.before: Neral at the rear, broad-shouldered and steady, the sort who looked built to keep order when the road broke.
changes.after: Neral steady at the rear, reins loose in practiced hands

changes.before: The mare accepted this with patient contempt, shifted once under her, then settled as if she had carried worse riders in worse weather.
changes.after: The mare accepted this with patient contempt, shifted once under her, then settled.

changes.before: Whatever silver had paid for this border, it had not stretched far enough south.
changes.after: The ward-stones had thinned too fast; south of the pass, the gaps were already opening.

changes.before: Whatever silver had paid for this border, it had not stretched far enough south.
changes.after: The ward-stones had thinned too fast; south of the pass, the gaps were already opening.

changes.before: make her hands want to shake
Jaina's hands stopped halfway through the explanation she had been about to give.
changes.after: Jaina cut herself off halfway through the explanation she had been about to give.

changes.before: "Yes," Jaina said, and now her voice came out in its natural cadence, quicker and cleaner.
the whole road narrowing to wolves, hooves, and the taste of copper in her mouth
changes.after: wolves, hooves, and the taste of copper in her mouth crowding out everything else

changes.before: The formation had pulled tight now.
changes.after: The riders pulled in tight now, Cyndia's stirrup nearly brushing hers, Lyriel ahead with bow in hand, Neral close enough behind for the horse's breath to reach her.

changes.before: The formation had pulled tight now. Cyndia close enough that stirrups nearly brushed. Lyriel ahead with bow in hand. Neral near enough behind that Jaina could hear her horse breathe.
changes.after: The riders pulled in tight now, Cyndia's stirrup nearly brushing hers, Lyriel ahead with bow in hand, Neral close enough behind for the horse's breath to reach her.

changes.before: Jaina could feel the rangers listening to the dark on all sides of her, each one holding her own piece of the road.
changes.after: Cyndia rode close, Lyriel ahead, Neral behind; hoofbeats on packed dirt kept their spacing clear as each ranger covered a different angle of the road.

changes.before: Jaina could feel the rangers listening to the dark on all sides of her, each one holding her own piece of the road.
changes.after: Cyndia rode close, Lyriel ahead, Neral behind; hoofbeats on packed dirt kept their spacing clear as each ranger covered a different angle of the road.
